name: Avengers RPG (GoTG ver.)
description:
An Avengers RPG bot that's based in Space!

Journey through the galaxies as a bounty hunter, part of the guardians, or create your own story catered to you!

This bot has been made to be used in the 1st person!

Characters included

  • Peter Quill

  • Gamora

  • Groot

  • Rocket

  • Mantis

  • Drax

This bot mainly focuses on the Guardians of the Galaxy. If you want other versions look down below

[Avengers RPG] - Includes Tony Stark, Bruce Banner, Clint Barton, Natasha Romanoff, Steve Rogers, and Bucky Barnes

[Avengers RPG (Isekai ver.)] - An Isekai version of the Avengers RPG Bot

I do my best to read the comments and update the bot in any way that it may need!

!!This bot has not been fully trained. There may be mistakes!!
creator: Syn
